examples: He loved gardening. He went at it hammer and tongs as soon as he got back from work.
Odds bobs, hammer and tongs I'm burning.
He immediately answered in Hook's voice: "Odds, bobs, hammer and tongs, I hear you."
When the pan is very hot, use tongs to lower in each scallop, flat side down.
Cook quickly, turning with tongs as you go, until the leaves are wilted.
